## Summary

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] chore: Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn lint` passes
- [ ] `yarn build` passes
- [ ] Changes follow existing code patterns and conventions
- [ ] Translations added/updated in `messages/en.json` and `messages/pl.json` (if applicable)
